title: Redis Streams Consumer Group Structure
description: JSON structure documentation for a Redis Streams consumer group, including pending entry list (PEL) state and consumer tracking.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Consumer group name. Unique per stream.

fields.name: stream
fields.description: The Redis key of the stream this group is attached to.

fields.name: last-delivered-id
fields.description: ID of the last entry delivered to any consumer in this group.

fields.name: entries-read
fields.description: Total entries read by the group (Redis 7.0+).

fields.name: lag
fields.description: Number of entries yet to be delivered (Redis 7.0+).

fields.name: pel-count
fields.description: Count of entries in the Pending Entries List — delivered but not yet acknowledged.

fields.name: consumers
fields.description: Individual consumers registered in this group.

fields.name: pending
fields.description: Number of PEL entries for this consumer.
